message:
fix(safety): replace as-usize casts with try_from and document SIMD invariants

- Replace all `as usize` casts in ann_index.rs load/build paths with
  `usize::try_from().context()` for proper error propagation on
  platforms where u32/u64 may not fit in usize
- Replace `.unwrap()` with `.expect("chunks_exact guarantees 8 elements")`
  in vector_index.rs SIMD dot product to document the invariant

br-2sf1p

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
